title: build_relationship issues 7 sequential queries
description: interactions.rs build_relationship makes 7 separate sequential DB round-trips (following, followed_by, show_reblogs, notify, blocking, blocked_by, muting) to construct a single relationship JSON. These could be collapsed into one or two queries using subqueries or CASE expressions. This function is called after every follow/unfollow/block/unblock/mute/unmute.
close_reason: Deferred: performance optimization. Relationship checks are infrequent.
